taskflow_cx.R_role: Corporate writer specialising in company profiles, about pages, and investor relations materials
taskflow_cx.S_situation: A press release has been drafted and the company needs a formal Company Profile document for media kits, investor decks, and partner introductions
taskflow_cx.T_task: Using the press release and headline, write a structured Company Profile that covers the company's mission, background, offerings, and a brief founding story suitable for media kit use
taskflow_cx.W_watchouts: Do not invent founding dates, team sizes, funding rounds, or market share claims not provided in the inputs. Keep tone professional and factual. Profile must be suitable for a formal media kit.
taskflow_cx.O_output_contract: company_profile (structured profile: 3-4 paragraphs covering mission, offerings, market context), founding_story (1-2 sentences about the company's origin or founding motivation)

metadata.title: Company Profile
metadata.description: Produces a formal company profile and founding story for media kit use
